message:
feat(func,harness,core,vfs): implement compile_options function parity, improve conformance oracles, and add VFS memory accounting

Function parity (sqlite_compileoption_used/get):
- Define canonical SQLITE_COMPILE_OPTIONS list (9 entries: FRANKENSQLITE,
  ENABLE_ICU, ENABLE_GEOPOLY, etc.) in builtins.rs
- Implement sqlite_compileoption_used() with SQLITE_ prefix stripping
  and case-insensitive matching
- Wire SqliteCompileoptionUsedFunc and SqliteCompileoptionGetFunc to
  use the canonical list
- Export sqlite_compile_options and sqlite_compileoption_used from
  fsqlite-func crate root
- Add parity matrix entry for compile_options functions with
  verification evidence
- Expand test_sqlite_meta_functions: verify THREADSAFE=1 present,
  ENABLE_ICU present, ENABLE_FTS3 absent, and PRAGMA compile_options
  matches compileoption_get() enumeration

Conformance oracle improvements:
- Refactor all three oracle harnesses (ext, s55, s74b) from nested
  match to 4-arm tuple match (frank_result, csql_result) with explicit
  BOTH_ERROR reporting when both engines fail
- Add test_oracle_compare_flags_dual_error_cases to each harness

VFS memory accounting:
- Add MemoryVfsConfig (initial_reserve, growth_chunk, max_bytes) and
  MemoryVfsUsageSnapshot to MemoryVfs
- Implement full tracked heap accounting (MemoryVfsUsageState) across
  all write/truncate/delete/close paths
- Growth uses round_up_to_chunk and next_growth_target with
  try_reserve_exact
- Add ensure_total_reserved_within_limit for hard cap enforcement

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -700,6 +700,26 @@ impl BuiltinFunctionParityMatrix {
             None,
             &["meta"],
         );
+        add(
+            FunctionFamily::Meta,
+            "sqlite_compileoption_used() / sqlite_compileoption_get()",
+            "compile_option_introspection_contract",
+            VerificationStatus::Passing,
+            &[
+                "SELECT sqlite_compileoption_used('THREADSAFE')",
+                "SELECT sqlite_compileoption_used('SQLITE_ENABLE_ICU')",
+                "SELECT sqlite_compileoption_get(0)",
+                "PRAGMA compile_options",
+            ],
+            &[(
+                "crates/fsqlite-harness/tests/bd_2yqp6_5_1_function_parity_matrix.rs",
+                "test_sqlite_meta_functions",
+                VerificationOracle::MetadataAssertion,
+            )],
+            "Verifies the exposed compile-option surface, including optional SQLITE_-prefix handling and alignment with PRAGMA compile_options.",
+            None,
+            &["meta", "introspection"],
+        );
         add(
             FunctionFamily::Meta,
             "changes() / total_changes()",
